name: Quince Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a late-stage biotechnology company dedicated to unlocking the power of a patients own biology for the treatment of rare diseases. Our proprietary AIDE technology platform is an innovative drug/device combination that uses an automated process designed to encapsulate a drug into the patients own red blood cells. Red blood cells have several characteristics that make them an excellent vehicle for drug delivery, potentially including better safety and tolerability, enhanced...
